---
title: "Minitab Labs"
date: "2023-08-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

This page contains labs for MATH 012 S110/S210: Fall 2023.

| Date      | Lab      |  etc     |
|:-----:|:------:|:-------:|
| 8/24 | [Test](https://th-kimm.github.io/MATH012/Rec_1.html) | -   |
